stemHtml: Insects have blocked the static ports.  During take off the VSI will (1) _____ this will become apparent (2) _____.  It's hard to notice initially because of (3) _____ and it will  (4) _____  pilot workload.

options.a: (1) read zero; (2) when the aircraft starts moving; (3) position error; (4) not affect
options.b: (1) read zero; (2) when the aircraft starts climbing; (3) lag error; (4) increase
options.c: (1) underread; (2) when the aircaft starts climbing; (3) instrument error; (4) not affect
options.d: (1) Overread; (2) when the aircaft starts moving; (3) lag error; (4) have little effect on
